delta_scope_note: delta scope (reasoning — 3 blocking findings only); full suite (tests — complete stream-worker suite re-run, full Playwright backfill.spec.ts + marketplace.spec.ts regression)

tests_run.name: Track A — full stream-worker suite (ALL files, regression + new T11+T12)
tests_run.evidence: 5 test files passed, 67/67 tests passed, exit 0. Duration 38.59s. Includes new T11 (SEC-BF-H1 fix proof, 3 assertions) and T12 (SC#10 end-to-end, 3 assertions). Prior suite had 61/61; +6 new assertions, zero regressions.

tests_run.name: Migration 0023 — list_queued_backfill_jobs SECURITY DEFINER
tests_run.command: docker exec brainv3-postgres-1 psql -U brain -d brain -c "SELECT proname, prosecdef, proconfig FROM pg_proc WHERE proname = 'list_queued_backfill_jobs';"
tests_run.evidence: prosecdef=t (SECURITY DEFINER confirmed), proconfig={search_path=public} (hijack prevention confirmed). Function returns TABLE(id uuid, brand_id uuid, connector_instance_id uuid). GRANT EXECUTE TO brain_app confirmed via \df output.

tests_run.name: QA-BF-B1 negative control — brain_app WITHOUT GUC returns 0 rows on backfill_job
tests_run.command: T11 inner assertion: brain_app direct SELECT count(*) FROM backfill_job WHERE status='queued' (no GUC)
tests_run.evidence: T11 assertion 1 PASS: rowCount=0, confirming FORCE RLS fail-closed without GUC. This is the non-inert negative control that was missing in the prior FULL review.

tests_run.name: QA-BF-B1 fix proof — findQueuedJob() via list_queued_backfill_jobs() returns seeded job
tests_run.command: T11 inner assertions 2+3: findQueuedJob(appPool, ciId) and poll-mode findQueuedJob(appPool)
tests_run.evidence: T11 assertion 2+3 PASS: both return the seeded queued job (id, brandId, ciId match). Worker dispatch path functional without GUC via SECURITY DEFINER fn.

tests_run.name: QA-BF-B2 — past-dated→realized end-to-end (SC#10 payoff)
tests_run.command: T12 in backfill.e2e.test.ts: LedgerWriter seed + runRevenueFinalization() invocation
tests_run.evidence: Captured stdout: '[revenue-finalization] finalized brand=aa111111-aaaa-4aaa-8aaa-111111111111 order=T12-PAST-DATED-ORDER-001 amount=250000 INR' and '[revenue-finalization] complete: finalized=1 skipped=0'. Idempotent second run: 'complete: finalized=0 skipped=0'. All under brain_app (not superuser). event_type='finalization', amount_minor='250000' (no float drift). SC#10 payoff demonstrated end-to-end.

tests_run.name: Track C — backfill.spec.ts (Playwright e2e) — QA-BF-B3 re-run
tests_run.command: cd apps/web && DATABASE_URL=postgres://brain:brain@localhost:5432/brain npx playwright test e2e/backfill.spec.ts --reporter=list
tests_run.evidence: Test 1 (D-11 Gross Revenue label) PASS 6.3s. Test 2 (connectors page marketplace testids) PASS 6.0s [was FAIL — now fixed]. Test 3 SKIP (invite UI not in local env — documented acceptable skip; D-15 server gate authoritative via B3 T2). Tests 4+5+8+9 PASS. Tests 6+7 SKIP (SHOPIFY_CONNECTED_CONNECTOR_ID not set — unchanged documented skip). Exit 0.

tests_run.name: marketplace.spec.ts — regression check
tests_run.command: cd apps/web && DATABASE_URL=postgres://brain:brain@localhost:5432/brain npx playwright test e2e/marketplace.spec.ts --reporter=list
tests_run.evidence: 6/6 passed, 0 failed, exit 0. Duration 37.8s. No regression introduced by QA-BF-B3 fix commit 26647ae.

findings.resolution: Migration 0023 adds list_queued_backfill_jobs() SECURITY DEFINER (prosecdef=t, search_path=public pinned). run.ts findQueuedJob() calls the fn instead of bare backfill_job query. T11 proves: (a) brain_app without GUC → 0 rows (non-inert negative control); (b) findQueuedJob() via fn → seeded job returned. Worker dispatch path functional.

T12 added: seeds past-horizon provisional_recognition via LedgerWriter (occurred_at='2022-06-01'), invokes runRevenueFinalization() (real code, not stub), asserts finalizedCount===1, event_type='finalization', amount_minor='250000'. Idempotent on re-run (finalizedCount=0). Captured stdout confirms real fn executed. SC#10 end-to-end payoff proven.

Test 2 fixed: removed legacy fallback, now asserts marketplace-page + connector-tile-shopify directly (PASS). Test 3: Radix combobox fix in place; SKIPS in local env where invite UI not seeded — documented acceptable (D-15 server gate authoritative, B3 T2 meetsMinimumRole is unit-level authoritative gate). No new failures.
Tests 6+7 skip on missing SHOPIFY_CONNECTED_CONNECTOR_ID. D-15 server 403 gate authoritative via B3 T2+T4. Acceptable.
T9 skips insertQueued path at runtime (no real FK fixture). B3 T1 covers the path with real fixtures. Acceptable.

acceptable_skips.reason: Radix combobox fix applied; invite button not present in local env without seeded member invites. Skip is explicit and env-conditional, not a logic bug. D-15 server gate (403) is authoritative; B3 T2 (meetsMinimumRole) is the unit-level authoritative gate — confirmed PASS in prior FULL run (unchanged).
SHOPIFY_CONNECTED_CONNECTOR_ID not set in local env. Unchanged from original C3 design. Documented in developer report.

negative_control.protection: FORCE RLS on backfill_job (no GUC = fail-closed)
negative_control.command: brain_app direct SELECT count(*) FROM backfill_job WHERE status='queued' without set_config
negative_control.captured_red_output: rowCount=0, FORCE RLS blocks access without GUC (non-inert negative control — proves the fix is not tautological)
rowCount=0, currentUser=brain_app (unchanged from prior FULL — still green)

negative_control.protection: RLS on bronze_events (brand isolation + no-GUC fail-closed)
negative_control.command: brand_B GUC and no GUC → 0 rows; brand_A GUC → 1 row
